  • Overview
  • Tree
  • Deprecated
  • Index
  • Search
  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AllTests
     
    ArtificialGamePosition
    Represents a game position in an artificial game tree.
    ArtificialGamePosition.Settings
    A class that stores the settings for a ArtificialGamePosition tree.
    BstarBasic
    This class implements B* with a few additional modifications: if the number of back-ups without leading back to the root reaches 1000, the algorithm is forced to back-up to the root if a terminal node is selected, the algorithm is forced to back-up to the root if the current node's best child is not its least pessimistic child, there is a 30% chance that the least pessimistic child is selected, this will not occur if this would select a terminal node
    BstarBasicDB
    Disprove-Best B*, as described in the report https://github.com/Pascalos99/ReportNewAdvancesInBstar/blob/main/Anema2025.pdf
    BstarSquaredDB
    A B*² implementation which uses Disprove-Best B* at the first-level search only.
    BstarSquaredDB.L1Position<P>
     
    BstarSquaredDB.L1Position.Settings
     
    BstarSquaredSimple
    This implements B*²-logistic with the `dispose all' bounds preservation technique and no shallow or deep irrelevance.
    BstarSquaredSimple.L1Position<P>
     
    BstarSquaredSimple.L1Position.Settings
     
    BstarSquaredSimpleMax
    This implements B*²-max with the `dispose all' bounds preservation technique and no shallow or deep irrelevance.
    BstarSquaredSimpleMax.L1Position<P>
     
    BstarSquaredSimpleMax.L1Position.Settings
     
    BstarSquaredVariant
    Deprecated.
    BstarSquaredVariant.L1Position<P>
     
    BstarSquaredVariant.L1Position.Settings
     
    CompareAlgorithms
    Large class containing many methods for running the experiments and creating new experiments.
    CompareAlgorithms.AlgoSetup
    Class for configuring the setup of algorithms to experiments for comparing them.
    DebugPrinter
    A simple debug class.
    DepthFirstNode<P>
    GameTreeNode implementation that does not store children nodes, but does store the depth of bounds and the bounds themselves.
    DepthFirstNode.RootDFNode<P>
    An optional variant of the DepthFirstNode which stores the nodes at depth 1 in memory.
    DfBstar
    Deprecated.
    DfBstar2
    This is the df-B* implementation applied in the thesis.
    DfBstar3
    This implementation of df-B* with initial node selection inspired by B* Disprove-Best, but not exactly following it.
    DfBstarDB
    This implementation of df-B* applies concepts from B* Disprove-Best into the internal node selection procedure.
    ExamineBstarBehavior
    Deprecated.
    ExampleTrees
     
    Experiment1
    The first core experiment, with the goal of performing a general comparison of algorithm variants.
    Experiment1.Type
     
    Experiment2
    The second core experiment, with the goal of determining the exact memory footprint of B*-squared compared to B*
    Experiment3
    This is part of the preliminary experiments conducted to determine the value for P_{alt} as chosen in the thesis, which was found to at best be P_{alt}=0.3
    GameTreeNode<N,P>
    This class represents an abstract GameTreeNode which stores game positions of a game tree along with the structure of the tree itself through GameTreeNode.children(MetricKeeper...) and GameTreeNode.parent() relations.
    GameTreeNode.Result<N,P>
    A record to hold the two best nodes (and their indices in the original collection).
    GenerateBerlinerTreeFigures
    Generates the tree figures included in the thesis.
    Generator<T,S>
    A generator for customising the tree structure of artificial game trees made with the VariantAGP class.
    Generator.Bounds
    The generator type specifically used for generating the bounds of the children generated as the children of each node of a VariantAGP artificial game tree.
    Generator.Width
    The generator type specifically used for generating the variable branching factor at each node of a VariantAGP artificial game tree.
    IGamePosition<P>
    This interface represents a game position in any game which can be modelled as an adversarial or non-adversarial game.
    MetricKeeper
    This class is intended for use with algorithm testing by keeping track of metrics used to evaluate different algorithms on game tree search problems.
    Probability
     
    ResultTreeNode<N,P,Q>
    Creates a tree of position type Q from a source tree with position type P with the help of a P-to-Q transformer.
    SearchAlgorithm
    General interface for all search algorithms.
    SearchAlgorithm.Limits
    The limits imposed on the search.
    SearchAlgorithm.SearchResult<N,P>
    Encapsulates the results and metrics captured from an adversarial tree search.
    SearchAlgorithm.SearchWithTable
    This represents a search algorithm which primarily stores search results in a transposition table.
    SearchAlgorithm.SearchWithTree
    This represents a search algorithm which can search a given tree and modify it during search.
    SearchTreeNode<P>
    Implementation of GameTreeNode that stores all nodes directly in memory.
    SearchTreeNode.Settings
    A class that stores the settings for a SearchTreeNode tree.
    SimpleNode<P>
    Implementation of GameTreeNode that only acts as a facade for the underlying tree expressed by the P implementation of IGamePosition.
    SimplePosition
    A basic implementation of IGamePosition which allows for adding of children to the tree and setting their values.
    StopCondition
    A stop condition for B* search.
    StrategyFunction
    The heuristic function for determining the strategy at the root of any B* search.
    StrategyFunction.Deterministic
     
    StrategyFunction.HeuristicFunction
     
    StrategyFunction.NonDeterministic
     
    Table
    A very minimal transposition table implementation for df-B*.
    Table.Metrics
     
    Test_ArtificialGamePosition
     
    Test_BstarBasic
     
    Test_BstarBasicDB
     
    Test_BstarSquaredSimple
     
    Test_GameTreeNode
     
    Test_Probability
     
    Test_SearchAlgorithm
    Deprecated.
    Test_SearchTreeNode
     
    Test_VariantAGP
     
    TestDfBstar
    This class is part of the preliminary experiments performed on df-B* to find the values for sigma and epsilon chosen in the thesis for the core experiments.
    TestDfBstar.Result
     
    TextExplorer
    This class allows the manual exploration of trees.
    TreeToXML
     
    VariantAGP
    Represents a game position in a variant artificial game tree.
    VariantAGP.NodeInfo
    A record holding the information provided to Generator functions for determining the bounds of a generated child node.
    VariantAGP.Settings
    A class that stores the settings for a VariantAGP tree.
